first_hit_object_label: {pinball_motion_rule_text} Which labeled object is hit first?
{pinball_motion_rule_text} What is the label of the first object on that path?
{pinball_motion_rule_text} Identify the labeled object reached before any other object.
The ball follows the arrow direction in a straight line. Which labeled object is hit first?
{pinball_motion_rule_text} Report the label on the first labeled object the ball would reach.
scoreable_object_count: {pinball_scoreable_rule_text} How many scoreable objects are visible?
{pinball_scoreable_rule_text} How many objects show score values?
{pinball_scoreable_rule_text} Report the number of scoreable objects.
{pinball_scoreable_rule_text} How many numeric-score objects are on the table?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_schematic_table: a tilted pinball playfield with a ball, a straight launch cue, flippers, bumpers, lanes, and labeled targets
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_scoreable_count: a tilted pinball playfield with a ball, flippers, bumpers, lanes, numeric score targets, and blank objects
code_prompt_defaults.pinball_motion_rule_text: The arrow shows the ball's straight path; extend it in the same direction.
code_prompt_defaults.pinball_scoreable_rule_text: Objects with a number are scoreable; objects without a number are not scoreable.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_first_hit_object_label: set "annotation" to one [x, y] pixel point at the center of the first labeled object hit by the path
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_first_hit_object_label: set "answer" to the selected object label as a string
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_scoreable_object_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one around each object that shows a numeric score label
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_scoreable_object_count: set "answer" to the integer count of scoreable objects
